title: Comments from the Everyday Offer
p: Guests come to Dvije Žarulje for grill dishes, daily meals, quick service and takeaway options.

testimonials.quote: Both the owner and the staff are very friendly, the food is excellent, the prices are affordable.... Praiseworthy... And the barbecue... The best
testimonials.name: Davor

testimonials.quote: The food is top-notch and you can smell the fantastic smell of a real grill. Both the food and the ambiance are to be commended!
testimonials.name: Mandica

testimonials.quote: A good option for a quick lunch in Zagreb when you want big portions.
testimonials.name: Luka

testimonials.quote: The kebabs (Ćevapi) are always TOP, the meat is perfect, it's really meaty and it's been a long time since I've had kebabs that have a real meaty taste, you won't regret coming, there's a park right next to the restaurant so if you come with the kids they can play, they also have snacks on offer TOP 💪👌
testimonials.name: Maja

testimonials.quote: Today we sat down at Dvije žarulje for the first time for a quick lunch, and were delighted with both the food and the service - the kale stew was delicious, just like grandma's, and the pljeskavica was perfectly cooked, juicy and spicy. The food quality rivals much more expensive restaurants. We will definitely be back!
testimonials.name: Andrea

testimonials.quote: Fantastic food. Everything is freshly prepared. Every day there are three menus for the buffet and there is always a grill that is recommended for everyone. The only problem is that the owner works alone so it takes a little longer to get your order, but in any case it is worth the wait. The restaurant looks unsightly from the outside, but the food is really great!
testimonials.name: Helena

testimonials.quote: I am very satisfied with the price and taste. In fact, pleasantly surprised at last. I definitely recommend the salary because even four people will definitely not leave hungry from there. The space is not much, but you go there to eat, not to show off.
testimonials.name: Danijel

testimonials.quote: The daily dishes are practical when you want something warm, homestyle and simple.
testimonials.name: Marko

testimonials.quote: Ćevapi, burgers and chicken grill cover everything I expect from a neighborhood grill..
testimonials.name: Ivana

testimonials.quote: A convenient place to pick up food when there is no time to cook.
testimonials.name: Marija

testimonials.quote: The offer is clear, portions are satisfying, and the flavors are familiar and homestyle..
testimonials.name: Lovro

testimonials.quote: The salads and sides round out an order nicely, especially with grilled dishes.
testimonials.name: Tina
